c74object.name: ambitap.room~
c74object.category: audio, ambisonics, spatial, reverb, room, mc
c74object.digest: Shoebox room simulation for a mono source: image-source early reflections + FDN late reverb, output as one multichannel HOA bus of (order+1)^2 channels (AmbiX: ACN/SN3D)
c74object.description: Shoebox room simulation for a mono source: image-source early reflections + FDN late reverb, output as one multichannel HOA bus of (order+1)^2 channels (AmbiX: ACN/SN3D). Order is a creation argument (max 3).

method.name: reflections
method.digest: Set the six wall reflection coefficients: reflections
method.description: Set the six wall reflection coefficients: reflections .

method.name: rt60band
method.digest: Set one octave band's RT60: rt60band
method.description: Set one octave band's RT60: rt60band .

attribute.name: tail
attribute.digest: Enable the FDN late-reverb tail (t >= 30 ms)
attribute.description: Enable the FDN late-reverb tail (t >= 30 ms).

attribute.name: er
attribute.digest: Enable the image-source early reflections (first 30 ms)
attribute.description: Enable the image-source early reflections (first 30 ms).

attribute.name: direct
attribute.digest: Enable the direct-sound path (off = reflections/reverb only; compose with ambitap.encode~ for an anechoic direct path)
attribute.description: Enable the direct-sound path (off = reflections/reverb only; compose with ambitap.encode~ for an anechoic direct path).

attribute.name: source_z
attribute.digest: Source position z in meters from the room's origin corner
attribute.description: Source position z in meters from the room's origin corner.

attribute.name: listener_z
attribute.digest: Listener position z in meters from the room's origin corner
attribute.description: Listener position z in meters from the room's origin corner.

attribute.name: listener_x
attribute.digest: Listener position x in meters from the room's origin corner
attribute.description: Listener position x in meters from the room's origin corner.

attribute.name: listener_y
attribute.digest: Listener position y in meters from the room's origin corner
attribute.description: Listener position y in meters from the room's origin corner.

attribute.name: source_y
attribute.digest: Source position y in meters from the room's origin corner
attribute.description: Source position y in meters from the room's origin corner.

attribute.name: rt60
attribute.digest: Broadband reverb time in seconds (0.1..10): scales every octave band so the 1 kHz band lands here, preserving the spectral tilt
attribute.description: Broadband reverb time in seconds (0.1..10): scales every octave band so the 1 kHz band lands here, preserving the spectral tilt. Per-band control via the rt60band message.

attribute.name: dim_z
attribute.digest: Room height in meters (z, up axis)
attribute.description: Room height in meters (z, up axis). Clamped to 1..50 m.

attribute.name: dim_x
attribute.digest: Room depth in meters (x, front axis)
attribute.description: Room depth in meters (x, front axis). Clamped to 1..50 m.

attribute.name: dim_y
attribute.digest: Room width in meters (y, left axis)
attribute.description: Room width in meters (y, left axis). Clamped to 1..50 m.

attribute.name: source_x
attribute.digest: Source position x in meters from the room's origin corner
attribute.description: Source position x in meters from the room's origin corner.
